meta.run: 2026-06-20 clean run: lean 10-model roster, deterministic greedy, strong multilingual bge-m3 vector baseline served locally — NO Ollama, no network at inference. Pre-registered (docs/PROTOCOL.md); contrasts Holm–Bonferroni corrected with effect sizes.
meta.note: MetaQA + domains reflect the clean run above. The legacy `charts` leaderboard is the earlier sanctions sweep (kept for the cost/economics panels). Demo traces are one local model running the real engine.

Questions and gold answers come from MetaQA, not our graph — the graph-as-oracle circularity is removed. Clean movie KB (no entity resolution / no extraction noise), so mode differences reflect context FORMAT. Local 4-bit MLX models, DETERMINISTIC greedy decoding; the vector baseline uses a strong multilingual bge-m3 retriever served locally (no Ollama). 95% CIs are a paired bootstrap over the question set; contrast significance is Holm–Bonferroni corrected with paired effect sizes (d_z). Pre-registered (docs/PROTOCOL.md).

domains.note: Same engine, zero per-domain benchmark code — each graph's schema is introspected at query time. 8-model representative roster (Qwen3 size axis + tool-profile contrasts + llama-3.2-3b control), full question bank per domain, graph-oracle scored, local bge-m3, $0.
